anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate understanding of vocabulary and figurative language in informational texts.
eligibleContentText: Demonstrate understanding of figurative language, word relationships, and nuances in word meanings (figures of speech such as verbal irony and puns; word relationships; connotations vs. denotations).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Explain the function of verbals (i.e., gerunds, participles, and infinitives) in general and their function in particular sentences.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Form and use verbs in the active and passive voice.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Form and use verbs in the indicative, imperative, interrogative, conditional, and subjunctive mood.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Recognize and correct inappropriate shifts in verb voice and mood.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Place phrases and clauses within a sentence, recognizing and correcting misplaced and dangling modifiers.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Recognize and correct inappropriate shifts in pronoun number and person.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Recognize and correct vague pronouns (i.e., ones with unclear or ambiguous antecedents).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Recognize and correct inappropriate shifts in verb tense.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Produce complete sentences, recognizing and correcting inappropriate fragments and run-on sentences.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Correctly use frequently confused words (e.g., to, too, two; there, their, they're).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage.
eligibleContentText: Ensure subject-verb and pronoun-antecedent agreement.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Use punctuation (i.e., comma, ellipsis, and dash) to indicate a pause or break.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Use an ellipsis to indicate an omission.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Spell correctly.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Use punctuation (i.e., commas, parentheses, and dashes) to set off nonrestrictive/parenthetical elements.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling.
eligibleContentText: Use punctuation to separate items in a series.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Use knowledge of language and its conventions.
eligibleContentText: Use verbs in the active and passive voice and in the conditional and subjunctive mood to achieve particular effects (e.g., emphasizing the actor or the action, expressing uncertainty, or describing a state contrary to fact).
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Use knowledge of language and its conventions.
eligibleContentText: Choose language that expresses ideas precisely and concisely, recognizing and eliminating wordiness and redundancy.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Use knowledge of language and its conventions.
eligibleContentText: Vary sentence patterns for meaning, reader/listener interest, and style.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Use knowledge of language and its conventions.
eligibleContentText: Maintain consistency in style and tone.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Use knowledge of language and its conventions.
eligibleContentText: Choose punctuation for effect.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Use knowledge of language and its conventions.
eligibleContentText: Choose words and phrases for effect.
sourceDocument: PDE Grade 8 ELA Assessment Anchors and Eligible Content

subject: ELA
anchorDescriptorText: Draw evidence from literary or informational texts to support analysis, reflection, and/or research.
eligibleContentText: Introduce text(s) for the intended audience, state an opinion and/or topic, establish a situation, and create an organizational structure in which ideas are logically grouped to support the writer's purpose.
